titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/219

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=166 status=live modified=2018-07-30 04:38:24.054708+00 | translation moa=167 status=live modified=2017-02-27 00:39:59.855472+00

div.p:
.D. rex Scot’. Episcopis . Abbatibus Comitibus Iusticiis Baronibus Vicecomitibus . ⁊ Omnibus fidelibus suis Clericis . ⁊ Laicis . tam
presentibus quam futuris totius Regni sui . salutem. Sciatis me dedisse ⁊ Concessisse . pro animabus antecessorum ⁊ successorum
meorum . in perpetuum . deo ⁊ Sancte Cruci de Edeneburc . ⁊ Canonicis fratribus nostris eiusdem loci . Videlicet .lii. acras
de terra de Dolchet inter nemus . ⁊ planam terram . in escambio de Rhuchale  quam monachis de Niwebotle
in perpetuam elemosinam donaui . Concedo etiam prenominatis Canonicis sanctę Crucis . Omnem decimam noui
molendini de Dene . ⁊ Burgi mei de Edeneb’ . ⁊ Libertonię in perpetuam elemosinam . Presentibus testibus . Iohanne Episcopo
Edwardo Cancellario . Dunec’ Comite . Hugone de Moruill’ . Willelmo de Lindes’ . Waltero de Ridal’ . Thor’ de
Treuernent . Malbet de Liberton’ . Apud . Castellum puellarum.

David king of Scots to the Bishops, Abbots, Earls, Justices, Barons, Sheriffs, and all his sworn men, clerk and lay, present as well as future, of the whole of his kingdom, Greeting: Know that I have given and granted, for the souls of my ancestors and successors, in perpetuity, to God and to Holyrood in Edinburgh, and to the canons our brethren of the same place, namely 52 acres of land at Dalkeith in the midst of the woodland and the level land, in exchange for ‘Rhuchdale’, which I have donated to the monks at Newbattle in perpetual alms. I also grant to the aforenamed canons of Holyrood every teind of the the new mill at Dean, and of my Burgh at Edinburgh, and of Liberton, in perpetual alms. Present as witnesses, John the Bishop, Edward the Chancellor, Duncan the Earl, Hugh de Morville, William of Lindsay, Walter of Ryedale, Thor of Tranent, Malbeath of Liberton. At Maidens’ Castle.
